title: cieca conspurcata
side_effects: Cieca conspurcata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and stomach cramps in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts has been linked to kidney damage and liver dysfunction in a few reported cases. In rare instances, an overdose of cieca conspurcata can lead to respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedies, including cieca conspurcata.
